parameters.query:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT type_id,
    AVG(CASE WHEN date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7  THEN average END) AS avg7,
    AVG(CASE WHEN date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30 THEN average END) AS avg30,
    AVG(CASE WHEN date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7  THEN volume  END) AS vol7,
    STDDEV(CASE WHEN date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30 THEN average END) AS sd30
  FROM daily_history WHERE region_id = 10000002
  GROUP BY type_id
),
opps AS (
  SELECT type_id, COUNT(*) AS opp_count, MAX(total_profit) AS best_profit
  FROM opportunities WHERE ts > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY type_id
)
SELECT w.type_id, w.name,
  (w.locked_until IS NOT NULL AND w.locked_until > NOW()) AS locked,
  ROUND(s.avg7::numeric, 2) AS avg7,
  ROUND(s.avg30::numeric, 2) AS avg30,
  ROUND(s.vol7::numeric, 0) AS vol7,
  ROUND((s.sd30 / NULLIF(s.avg30, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS volat_pct,
  COALESCE(o.opp_count, 0) AS opps30,
  ROUND(COALESCE(o.best_profit, 0)::numeric, 0) AS best_profit
FROM watchlist w
LEFT JOIN stats s ON s.type_id = w.type_id
LEFT JOIN opps  o ON o.type_id = w.type_id
WHERE w.status = 'active';

SELECT c.type_id, c.name FROM candidate_pool c
WHERE c.type_id NOT IN (SELECT type_id FROM watchlist WHERE status = 'active')
  AND c.type_id NOT IN (SELECT type_id FROM watchlist
                        WHERE status = 'retired' AND retired_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days')
LIMIT 40;

INSERT INTO watchlist_changes (action, type_id, item_name, reason)
SELECT $1, $2, $3, $4
WHERE $1 <> 'none'
RETURNING action, type_id, item_name AS name;

INSERT INTO watchlist (type_id, name, status, source, locked_until)
VALUES ($1, $2, 'active', 'ai', NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days')
ON CONFLICT (type_id) DO UPDATE
SET status = 'active', source = 'ai', added_at = NOW(),
    locked_until = NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days', retired_at = NULL;
UPDATE watchlist SET status = 'retired', retired_at = NOW() WHERE type_id = $1;
